App.Title: Performance Scheduler
App.Subtitle: Foreground-first scheduling, profile-driven power plans, and safe rollback for games and high-load desktop workloads.
Nav.OverviewDescription: Current state, automatic scheduling, and rollback
Nav.ProfilesDescription: Community resources, packs, and profile editing
Nav.DiagnosticsDescription: Capabilities, device fingerprint, GPU state, and recent logs
Nav.AppearanceDescription: Background image, window atmosphere, and visual preferences
Nav.SettingsDescription: Safety rules, startup behavior, and recovery options
Hint.RestorePowerPlan: Restore previous power plan on exit
Hint.ExecutableNames: One item per line. Example: eldenring.exe
Hint.ProcessNames: One item per line. Example: eldenring
Hint.WindowTitleContains: One item per line. Example: ELDEN RING
Hint.GlobalDefaultProfile: Use this profile as the fallback when no app-specific profile matches.
Hint.ProcessorMaxState: Optional. Limits the selected power plan's maximum processor state for the matched power source. Leave empty to keep Windows defaults.
Hint.GpuStrategy: This area stores GPU mode, clock limit, voltage offset, and other extension settings. Unsupported devices stay unavailable.
Hint.GpuVendorApi: Allow vendor-specific GPU APIs when an extension is available
Hint.GpuStrategyPlanned: Current build detects and stores GPU extension strategy fields. Live clock and voltage tuning remain experimental extensions.
Hint.BackgroundPolicies: Configure how launchers, browsers, chat apps, and other background apps should yield when this profile is active.
Hint.CommunityHub: This area is reserved for future server integration, cloud sync, and profile sharing.
Hint.PauseSchedulingAfterUnsafeExit: After an unsafe exit, suspend all scheduling until you manually resume it.
Hint.AutoRollbackOnUnsafeExit: Try to restore the last captured power plan and priorities on the next startup.
Hint.DisableProfileAfterRepeatedUnsafeRu: Automatically disable a profile after it repeatedly triggers unsafe shutdown recovery.
Hint.UnsafeRunThreshold: Unsafe run threshold before a profile is disabled.
Hint.LaunchAtStartup: Launch the app automatically after you sign in. Disabled by default.
Hint.AutoStartMonitoringOnLaunch: Default automatic scheduling: enable scheduling when the app starts. Disabled by default.
Hint.LanguageTransitionAnimationEnabled: Animate interface text in a random page-flip order when switching languages.
Hint.LanguageTransitionDurationSeconds: Total language transition duration. Range: 0.2 to 10 seconds.
Hint.SettingsApplyNextLaunch: Some startup protection settings apply from the next launch.
Hint.AppearanceTitle: Make the scheduler feel like your own cockpit.
Hint.AppearanceIntro: This page is the first split-out UI module. It currently controls the window background image and leaves room for themes, blur, and layout density.
Hint.AppearanceBackgroundToggleBody: The selected image is copied into the app runtime assets folder so the original file can move without breaking the interface.
Hint.AppearanceOpacityBody: Keep it subtle so cards and controls stay readable. Later we can add blur, tint, and per-page backgrounds here.
Hint.AppearanceThemeBody: Switch the app accent, sidebar tint, scrollbar color, and card surface together.
Hint.AppearanceColorFormat: Color format: #RRGGBB. Leave empty or enter an invalid value to return to the current theme default.
Hint.AppearancePreviewBody: The real window background updates immediately. The preview helps you judge whether the image is too strong before continuing.
Hint.AppearanceSidebarAdjustment: The sidebar background has been cropped into preview. Apply it after checking the result.
Hint.AppearanceContentAdjustment: The main content background has been cropped into preview. Apply it after checking the result.
Hint.CropSidebarBackgroundInstruction: Drag the crop frame to choose the sidebar display area. Drag corners to resize it. Confirm to generate a cropped preview image.
Hint.CropSidebarBackgroundFooter: The crop frame keeps the current sidebar ratio so the image will not warp after applying.
Hint.CropContentBackgroundInstruction: Drag the crop frame to choose the main content display area. Drag corners to resize it. Confirm to generate a cropped preview image.
Hint.CropContentBackgroundFooter: The crop frame keeps the current main content area ratio so the image will not warp after applying.
Hint.AppearanceNextTitle: Reserved for the next polish pass
Hint.AppearanceNextBody: Planned controls: preset themes, acrylic strength, background blur, card transparency, and compact/comfortable layout density.
Hint.MonitoringInterval: Lower values react faster. Higher values reduce background polling.
Hint.RollbackCard: If the system feels unstable, restore safe defaults or the last recorded stable scheduler state.
Hint.StartHereTitle: First time here? Follow these three steps.
Hint.StartStep1Body: Open Scheduling Config to import a community model pack or create an app profile for one game or application.
Hint.StartStep2Body: Return to Console and enable automatic scheduling now. Foreground changes will match profiles automatically.
Hint.StartStep3Body: If a power plan or priority change feels wrong, use one-click rollback. Startup protection also tries to restore safe defaults.
Hint.ProfilePathCommunityBody: The upper community area imports model strategy packs or app profiles. Imported items appear in the local library below.
Hint.ProfilePathLocalBody: A model strategy pack stores profiles for one PC model or hardware combination. Composition, removal, and export will build on this area.
Hint.ProfilePathEditBody: Select an app profile on the left, then edit app matching, power plan, priority, and background policies on the right.
Status.UseScanNow: Enable automatic scheduling to inspect the current foreground window.
Status.ProfileWaiting: Profile matching is waiting for the first inspection run.
Status.MonitorIdle: Monitoring is idle. Manual detection is ready.
Status.FirstFlow: The first MVP flow will appear here after a scan.
Status.CommunityCatalogEmpty: Community catalog is empty. The local cache has no downloadable profiles yet.
Status.CommunityCatalogLoaded: Loaded {0} community profile(s) into the local mirror.
Status.CommunityCatalogLoadedWithStrateg: Loaded {0} model strategy pack(s) and {1} community app profile(s) into the local mirror.
Status.SelectCommunityProfile: Select a community app profile to import it into the local library.
Status.SelectCommunityDeviceStrategy: Select a model strategy pack to import it into the local library.
Status.ImportedCommunityProfile: Imported community profile {0} into the local library.
Status.DeviceStrategyPackageEmpty: Model strategy pack {0} has no importable app profiles.
Status.ImportedCommunityDeviceStrategy: Imported model strategy pack {0}: {1} app profile(s) imported, {2} skipped. Device check: {3}
Status.MonitoringActive: Foreground changes trigger immediately. Fallback polling runs every {0} second(s).
Status.MonitoringStopped: Monitoring stopped. Manual detection remains available.
Status.ScanBlockedWhileSuspended: Automatic scheduling is currently suspended. Resume scheduling before running a scan.
Status.MonitorBlockedWhileSuspended: Automatic scheduling is currently suspended. Resume scheduling before starting monitoring.
Status.RollbackApplied: Rollback applied. Previous power plan and priorities were restored when possible.
Status.MonitoringFailed: Monitoring stopped because of an unexpected error: {0}
Status.StartupUnsafeExitDetected: The previous session did not exit cleanly. Startup protection has been enabled for this run.
Status.StartupRecoveryApplied: An unsafe shutdown was detected. Startup recovery automatically rolled back the last captured scheduler state.
Status.StartupRecoveryDisabledProfile: Profile {0} was disabled after {1} unsafe session(s).
Status.StartupRecoveryAppliedAndDisabled: Startup recovery rolled back the previous state and disabled profile {0} after {1} unsafe session(s).
Status.SchedulingResumed: Scheduling has resumed. Automatic profile application is enabled again.
Status.NoSavedProfiles: No saved profiles yet. Create one to begin.
Status.ImportedMigrationPackage: Imported migration package. Profiles: {0}. Packs: {1}. Settings: {2}. Compatibility: {3}
Status.SelectProfileRevision: Select a profile and one of its revisions to rollback.
Status.ProfileRollbackFailed: Profile rollback failed because the selected revision was unavailable.
Status.NoActiveProcessMetadata: No active process metadata was captured.
Status.CurrentForegroundNoMatch: The current foreground app did not match any saved profile.
Status.GpuCapabilitySummaryFormat: Plug-in slot: {0} | Live apply: {1} | Clock control: {2} | Voltage control: {3}
Status.DeviceFingerprintUnavailable: Device fingerprint has not been collected yet.
Status.StorageSummaryFormat: App profiles: {0} | Model packs: {1} | Profile dir: {2} | Pack dir: {3} | Community cache: {4} | DB: {5}
Status.AppearanceBackgroundSelected: Background image has been copied to {0}.
Status.AppearanceSidebarBackgroundPrevie: Sidebar background loaded into preview: {0}. Adjust it, then apply.
Sidebar background preview cancelled. The current sidebar background was not overwritten.
Status.AppearanceContentBackgroundPrevie: Main content background loaded into preview: {0}. Check it, then apply.
Main content background preview cancelled. The current main content background was not overwritten.
Status.AppearanceRegionBackgroundCleared: Region background images have been cleared.
Status.AppearanceBackgroundFailed: Failed to update the background image: {0}
Status.AppearanceSurfaceColorReset: Surface color returned to the theme default.
Status.AppearanceBorderColorReset: Border color returned to the theme default.
Status.SummaryNoMatch: Foreground app {0} has no matching profile.
Status.SummaryAppliedProfileWithBackgrou: Applied profile {0} to {1} and adjusted {2} background process(es).
Validation.ProfileVersionInvalid: Profile version must be 1 or greater.
Validation.AtLeastOneMatchRule: Add at least one match rule or choose a target classification.
Validation.OnlyOneGlobalDefaultProfile: Only one global default profile can stay enabled. Current conflict: {0}.
Validation.ExecutableNameExtension: Executable names should usually include an extension such as .exe.
Validation.ProcessNamePathSeparator: Process names should not include directory separators.
Validation.GpuClockLimitInvalid: GPU clock limit must be a positive integer when provided.
Validation.GpuVoltageOffsetInvalid: GPU voltage offset must be an integer between -500 mV and 500 mV.
Validation.ProcessorMaxStateInvalid: CPU max state must be an integer from 1 to 100 when provided.
Validation.BackgroundPolicyCategoryRequi: Each background policy must have a category.
Validation.BackgroundPolicyDuplicateCate: Background policy categories must be unique. Duplicates: {0}.
Dialog.ImportOverwriteQuestion: Overwrite existing profiles with the same file target?
Dialog.RollbackProfileQuestion: Rollback {0} to revision {1}? This creates a new current version.
Dialog.ImportCommunityOverwriteQuestion: A local profile with the same id already exists: {0}. Overwrite it with the selected community version?
Dialog.ImportDeviceStrategyOverwriteQues:
{0} app profile(s) in this model strategy pack have the same IDs as local profiles.

Choose Yes to overwrite those local app profiles. Choose No to skip duplicates and keep importing the rest.
Capability.PowerPlanSupported: Power plan switching: supported ({0} plan(s) detected)
Capability.PowerPlanUnsupported: Power plan switching: device does not support this option
Capability.PriorityUnsupported: Foreground priority boost: device does not support this option
Capability.RollbackUnsupported: Rollback manager: device does not support this option
Capability.MetricsUnsupported: Metrics collector: device does not support this option
Capability.EfficiencySupported: Efficiency mode hint: available for later phases
Capability.EfficiencyUnsupported: Efficiency mode hint: device does not support this option
Capability.GpuUnsupportedPlatform: GPU vendor extensions: this platform does not expose the required Windows interfaces yet
Capability.GpuUnavailable: GPU vendor extensions: no configurable adapter was detected
Capability.GpuVendorUnknown: GPU vendor extensions: adapter {0} was detected, but vendor {1} is not mapped yet
Capability.GpuVendorExtensionReady: GPU vendor extensions: adapter {0} ({1}) was detected and a plug-in slot is ready
Capability.GpuProviderPlaceholder: GPU vendor extensions: adapter {0} ({1}) is mapped to provider {2}, but live tuning is still disabled in this build
Capability.GpuDetectionFailed: GPU vendor extensions: detection failed for adapter {0}; GPU controls stay disabled
DeviceCompatibility.Unknown: The source device cannot be verified.
DeviceCompatibility.SameHardware: The source device appears to match this hardware.
DeviceCompatibility.SameMachineModel: The source device uses the same machine model, but hardware details may differ.
DeviceCompatibility.DifferentDevice: The source device differs from this machine; imported tuning may need review.
